evals.prompt: I manage client engagements at a consulting firm and every week I need to pull metrics from our project tracking tool, our time billing system, and Jira, write up a status report with a risks section, get it reviewed by the account lead, and send it to the client by Friday noon. The review step keeps getting rushed and risks get undersold. I want to use AI to help me do this more consistently. Can you help me create a structured process for this?
evals.expected_output: Socratic discovery across 5 layers followed by a confirmation summary. Then generates a client-reporting-pdca skill with domain-specific working agreements, STOP triggers (specifically around the risks section and account lead review gate), and phase prompts with specific phase boundaries.

evals.prompt: I run a weekly podcast on B2B SaaS topics. My workflow is: record interview, transcribe, edit audio, write show notes, create 5 social posts, upload to the hosting platform, and publish. I spend way too much time on show notes and social posts and the quality is inconsistent. I want AI to help but I need to stay in control of the final editorial decisions. Help me build a repeatable process for this.
evals.expected_output: Socratic discovery that surfaces editorial approval as a human-owned decision, audio editing as a human-owned step, and show notes/social posts as AI-executable with human review gate. Generates a podcast-production-pdca skill with specific intervention triggers for editorial gates.

evals.prompt: Every month I analyze customer churn for our SaaS product. I pull cohort data from our data warehouse, run SQL queries, identify patterns, and write a report with recommendations that goes to the leadership team. The interpretation and the recommendations need to come from me -- I have business context the data alone doesn't show. I want AI to help with the data wrangling and initial pattern identification, but not the analysis conclusions. How should I structure this?
evals.expected_output: Discovery surfaces a clear human-AI split: AI handles data wrangling and pattern surface, human owns interpretation and recommendations. Generated skill has a hard gate before AI produces any recommendations. SKILL.md description contains churn/data analysis domain terminology.
